name: Top 5 clients leaderboard
description: Sidebar leaderboard ranks clients by lifetime revenue. User uses it as a 'who matters most' anchor and can jump to a client's page from there.

persona.name: Diego Martínez
persona.context: Quarterly review — which 5 clients account for most of his revenue?

preconditions: Account has 30+ clients with varied revenue history

steps.expect: 5 entries with rank, client name/initials, lifetime revenue formatted as currency
Navigates to that client's profile / drawer with full timeline
Leaderboard data is the same (cached); no 'loading...' shimmer for already-fetched results

evaluationCriteria.check: Rank numbers are visually weighted; #1 stands out from #5
Tied revenues are broken with a stable secondary sort (e.g. last contact)
Revenue figures match the sum of paid invoices for that client — sanity check against a known account
Leaderboard is an ol with li children; rank conveyed via list semantics not just visuals
